seo.title: Thriving Beyond Recovery | Plan Your Recovery
seo.description: A six-month empowerment program for people who have completed initial recovery work and are ready to build a fulfilling life. Led by Michelle Charbonnier.

hero.headline: Thriving Beyond Recovery
hero.subheadline: Sacred Steps to Abundance Beyond Recovery's Boundaries
hero.intro: You've done the hard work of early recovery. This program is for people who are ready to shift from surviving to genuinely thriving — building a life that feels worth living.

about.heading: About the Program

leader.name: Michelle Charbonnier, CRADC
leader.bio: Michelle has 9+ years of experience in recovery work. She is a certified gambling disorder counselor, registered yoga teacher, and SMART Recovery facilitator.

details: Virtual group sessions twice monthly, 90 minutes each
One-on-one digital access to Michelle between sessions

whoItsFor.heading: Who This Program Is For
isFor: People who have overcome significant challenges — trauma, substance use, codependency
Those transitioning from survival mode to building abundance
People with basic stability who are ready to grow
whoItsFor.isNotFor: This program is not appropriate for people still in early recovery or those who need intensive clinical support. If that's where you are, we have other services that are a better fit — and we're glad to help you find them.

themes.heading: Core Themes
items: Daily practices that nourish without overwhelming

cta.heading: Interested in the Program?
cta.body: Contact Michelle to learn about upcoming program dates and whether this is a good fit for where you are in your journey.
